                             Color="@(_category == null ? Color.Primary : Color.Default)"
                             Variant="@(_category == null ? Variant.Filled : Variant.Outlined)"
                             OnClick="@(() => _category = null)">All</MudChip>
                    @foreach (var cat in _categories)
                    {
                        var c = cat;
                        <MudChip T="string" Size="Size.Small"
                                 Color="@(_category == c ? Color.Primary : Color.Default)"
                                 Variant="@(_category == c ? Variant.Filled : Variant.Outlined)"
                                 OnClick="@(() => _category = c)">@c</MudChip>
                    }
                </div>

                <div class="bm-batches-list">
                    @foreach (var batch in Filtered)
                    {
                        var b = batch;
                        var active = ReferenceEquals(b, _selected);
                        <div class="bm-batch-item @(active ? "bm-batch-item-active" : "")"
                             @onclick="@(() => SelectBatch(b))">
                            <div class="bm-batch-item-name">@b.Name</div>
                            <div class="bm-batch-item-meta">
                                <span class="bm-batch-item-cat">@b.Category</span>
                                <span class="bm-batch-item-params">@b.Parameters.Count param@(b.Parameters.Count != 1 ? "s" : "")</span>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- ── Right: batch detail + parameter form ──────────────────── -->
            <div class="bm-batches-detail">
                @if (_selected is null)
                {
                    <div class="bm-lb-empty">
                        <MudIcon Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.ArrowBack" Style="font-size:36px;opacity:.3" />
                        <MudText Typo="Typo.body2" Style="opacity:.5">Select a batch from the list</MudText>
                    </div>
                }
                else
                {
                    <div class="bm-batch-detail-inner">

                        <!-- Header -->
                        <div class="bm-batch-detail-header">
                            <div>
                                <div class="bm-batch-detail-title">@_selected.Name</div>
                                <div class="bm-batch-detail-desc">@_selected.Description</div>
                                <div class="bm-batch-detail-tags">
                                    <MudChip T="string" Size="Size.Small" Color="Color.Primary"
                                             Variant="Variant.Filled" Class="bm-batch-cat-chip">
                                        @_selected.Category
                                    </MudChip>
                                    @foreach (var tag in _selected.Tags)
                                    {
                                        <MudChip T="string" Size="Size.Small" Variant="Variant.Outlined">@tag</MudChip>
                                    }
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <MudDivider Class="my-3" />

                        <!-- Parameters -->
                        @if (_selected.Parameters.Count > 0)
                        {
                            <div class="bm-batch-params-title">Parameters</div>
                            <div class="bm-batch-params-grid">
                                @foreach (var p in _selected.Parameters)
                                {
                                    var pk = p.Key;
                                    <div class="bm-batch-param-row">
                                        @if (p.Type == "boolean")
                                        {
                                            <MudSwitch T="bool"
                                                       Label="@p.Label"
                                                       Value="@_boolValues.GetValueOrDefault(pk)"
                                                       ValueChanged="@(v => { _boolValues[pk] = v; })"
                                                       Color="Color.Primary"
                                                       Class="bm-batch-switch"
                                                       title="@p.Description" />
                                        }
                                        else if (p.Type == "select")
                                        {
                                            <MudSelect T="string"
                                                       Label="@(p.Label + (p.Required ? " *" : ""))"
                                                       Value="@_strValues.GetValueOrDefault(pk, "")"
                                                       ValueChanged="@(v => { _strValues[pk] = v; })"
                                                       Variant="Variant.Outlined"
                                                       Margin="Margin.Dense"
                                                       Dense="true"
                                                       HelperText="@p.Description">
                                                @foreach (var opt in p.Options)
                                                {
                                                    <MudSelectItem T="string" Value="@opt">@opt</MudSelectItem>
                                                }
                                            </MudSelect>
                                        }
                                        else if (p.Type == "multiselect")
                                        {
                                            <MudSelect T="string"
                                                       Label="@(p.Label + (p.Required ? " *" : ""))"
                                                       SelectedValues="@(_multiValues.GetValueOrDefault(pk, []))"
                                                       SelectedValuesChanged="@((IReadOnlyCollection<string> v) => { _multiValues[pk] = v; })"
                                                       MultiSelection="true"
                                                       Variant="Variant.Outlined"
                                                       Margin="Margin.Dense"
                                                       Dense="true"
                                                       HelperText="@p.Description">
                                                @foreach (var opt in p.Options)
                                                {
                                                    <MudSelectItem T="string" Value="@opt">@opt</MudSelectItem>
                                                }
                                            </MudSelect>
                                        }
                                        else if (p.Type == "number")
                                        {
                                            <MudNumericField T="double"
                                                             Label="@(p.Label + (p.Required ? " *" : ""))"
                                                             Value="@(double.TryParse(_strValues.GetValueOrDefault(pk, "0"), System.Globalization.NumberStyles.Any, System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, out var _n) ? _n : 0d)"
                                                             ValueChanged="@((double v) => { _strValues[pk] = v.ToString(System.Globalization.CultureInfo.InvariantCulture); })"
                                                             Variant="Variant.Outlined"
                                                             Margin="Margin.Dense"
                                                             Min="@(p.Min ?? double.MinValue)"
                                                             Max="@(p.Max ?? double.MaxValue)"
                                                             HelperText="@p.Description" />
                                        }
                                        else
                                        {
                                            <MudTextField T="string"
                                                          Label="@(p.Label + (p.Required ? " *" : ""))"
                                                          Value="@_strValues.GetValueOrDefault(pk, "")"
                                                          ValueChanged="@(v => { _strValues[pk] = v ?? ""; })"
                                                          Variant="Variant.Outlined"
                                                          Margin="Margin.Dense"
                                                          Immediate="true"
                                                          Placeholder="@(p.Type == "date" ? "YYYY-MM-DD" : "")"
                                                          HelperText="@p.Description" />
                                        }
                                    </div>
                                }
                            </div>

                            <MudDivider Class="my-3" />
                        }

                        <!-- Endpoint preview -->
                        <div class="bm-batch-endpoint">
                            <span class="bm-batch-endpoint-method">@_selected.Endpoint.Method</span>
                            <span class="bm-batch-endpoint-url">@ResolveUrl(_selected)</span>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Run button + result -->
                        <div class="bm-batch-actions">
                            <MudButton Variant="Variant.Filled" Color="Color.Primary"
                                       StartIcon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.PlayArrow"
                                       Size="Size.Large"
                                       Disabled="@(_running || !CanRun)"
                                       OnClick="RunAsync">
                                @(_running ? "Running…" : "Run Batch")
                            </MudButton>
                            @if (_running)
                            {
                                <MudProgressCircular Indeterminate="true" Size="Size.Small" Color="Color.Primary" Class="ml-3" />
                            }
                        </div>

                        @if (_lastResult is not null)
                        {
                            <div class="bm-batch-result @(_lastResult.Success ? "bm-batch-result-ok" : "bm-batch-result-err")">
                                <MudIcon Icon="@(_lastResult.Success ? Icons.Material.Outlined.CheckCircle : Icons.Material.Outlined.Error)"
                                         Size="Size.Small" Class="mr-1" />
                                <span>@(_lastResult.Message ?? _lastResult.Error)</span>
                                @if (_lastResult.JobId is not null)
                                {
                                    <MudChip T="string" Size="Size.Small" Class="ml-2"
                                             Variant="Variant.Outlined">Job: @_lastResult.JobId</MudChip>
                                }
                            </div>

                            <MudExpansionPanels Class="mt-2" Dense="true">
                                <MudExpansionPanel Text="Request details" Dense="true">
                                    <div class="bm-batch-code">
                                        <div class="bm-batch-code-label">URL</div>
                                        <pre class="bm-batch-code-pre">@_lastResult.ResolvedUrl</pre>
                                        <div class="bm-batch-code-label mt-2">Body</div>
                                        <pre class="bm-batch-code-pre">@_lastResult.ResolvedBody</pre>
                                    </div>
                                </MudExpansionPanel>
                            </MudExpansionPanels>
                        }

                    </div>
                }
            </div>

        </div>
    }

</div>

@code {
    [Parameter] public string Environment { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    [Parameter] public TabModel? Tab { get; set; }

    private bool   _loading = true;
    private string _search   = "";
    private string? _category;
    private bool   _running;

    private List<BatchDefinition>  _batches    = [];
    private List<string>           _categories = [];
    private BatchDefinition?       _selected;
    private BatchTriggerResult?    _lastResult;

    // Per-param value stores
    private Dictionary<string, string>        _strValues  = new();
    private Dictionary<string, bool>          _boolValues = new();
    private Dictionary<string, IReadOnlyCollection<string>> _multiValues = new();

    private IEnumerable<BatchDefinition> Filtered =>
        _batches.Where(b =>
            (_category is null || b.Category == _category) &&
            (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_search) ||
             b.Name.Contains(_search, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
             b.Description.Contains(_search, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
             b.Tags.Any(t => t.Contains(_search, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))));

    private bool CanRun => _selected is not null &&
        (_selected.Parameters
            .Where(p => p.Required)
            .All(p => p.Type == "multiselect"
                ? (_multiValues.TryGetValue(p.Key, out var mv) && mv.Any())
                : (_strValues.TryGetValue(p.Key, out var sv) && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(sv))));

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        Tab?.BeginLoading();
        TabService.NotifyChanged();
        try
        {
            _batches    = (await CatalogSvc.GetBatchesAsync()).ToList();
            _categories = _batches.Select(b => b.Category).Distinct().Order().ToList();
            _loading    = false;
            if (_batches.Count > 0) SelectBatch(_batches[0]);
        }
        finally
        {
            Tab?.EndLoading();
            TabService.NotifyChanged();
        }
    }

    private void SelectBatch(BatchDefinition batch)
    {
        _selected   = batch;
        _lastResult = null;
        _strValues  = new();
        _boolValues = new();
        _multiValues = new();

        var today     = DateTime.Today.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd");
        var yesterday = DateTime.Today.AddDays(-1).ToString("yyyy-MM-dd");
        var month     = DateTime.Today.Month.ToString("D2");
        var year      = DateTime.Today.Year.ToString();

        foreach (var p in batch.Parameters)
        {
            if (p.Type == "boolean")
            {
                var d = p.DefaultString();
                _boolValues[p.Key] = d is "true" or "True" or "1";
            }
            else if (p.Type == "multiselect")
            {
                var list = p.DefaultList().Select(v => ResolvePlaceholder(v, today, yesterday, month, year)).ToList();
                _multiValues[p.Key] = list;
            }
            else
            {
                var d = p.DefaultString();
                _strValues[p.Key] = ResolvePlaceholder(d, today, yesterday, month, year);
            }
        }
    }

    private static string ResolvePlaceholder(string s, string today, string yesterday, string month, string year) =>
        s.Replace("{today}", today)
         .Replace("{yesterday}", yesterday)
         .Replace("{month}", month)
         .Replace("{year}", year);

    private string ResolveUrl(BatchDefinition b) =>
        b.Endpoint.Url
         .Replace("{id}",  b.Id)
         .Replace("{env}", Environment);

    private async Task RunAsync()
    {
        if (_selected is null) return;
        _running    = true;
        _lastResult = null;
        StateHasChanged();

        var flat = new Dictionary<string, string>(_strValues);
        foreach (var (k, v) in _boolValues)
            flat[k] = v ? "true" : "false";
        foreach (var (k, mv) in _multiValues)
            flat[k] = string.Join(",", mv);

        _lastResult = await CatalogSvc.TriggerAsync(_selected, flat, Environment);
        _running    = false;

        if (_lastResult.Success)
            Snackbar.Add(_lastResult.Message ?? "Batch triggered", Severity.Success);
        else
            Notifications.Report(_lastResult.Error ?? "Trigger failed", source: "Batches");
    }

}

@* Catch-all route — MainLayout renders all content via the tab system; this page has no body. *@

@using NxtUI.Core.Services
@using NxtUI.Shared
@inject IEnvConfigService EnvConfigSvc
@inject ILogViewerService LogViewerSvc
@inject ErrorNotificationService Notifications
@inject IDialogService DialogService
@inject ISnackbar Snackbar
@inject IJSRuntime JS
@inject DateTimeDisplayService DtSvc
@inject ThemeService ThemeSvc
@implements IAsyncDisposable

<div class="bm-page bm-page-fill bm-config-page">

    <div class="bm-batch-toolbar bm-config-edit-toolbar">
        @if (_editable)
        {
            <MudTooltip Text="Undo (Ctrl+Z)">
                <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Undo" Size="Size.Small" OnClick="@(() => Cmd("cmUndo"))" />
            </MudTooltip>
            <MudTooltip Text="Redo (Ctrl+Y)">
                <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Redo" Size="Size.Small" OnClick="@(() => Cmd("cmRedo"))" />
            </MudTooltip>

            <MudDivider Vertical="true" FlexItem="true" Class="mx-1" />

            <MudTooltip Text="Fold all (Ctrl+Alt+[)">
                <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.UnfoldLess" Size="Size.Small" OnClick="@(() => Cmd("cmFoldAll"))" />
            </MudTooltip>
            <MudTooltip Text="Unfold all (Ctrl+Alt+])">
                <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.UnfoldMore" Size="Size.Small" OnClick="@(() => Cmd("cmUnfoldAll"))" />
            </MudTooltip>

            <MudDivider Vertical="true" FlexItem="true" Class="mx-1" />

            <MudTooltip Text="Find / Replace (Ctrl+F)">

                         AnchorOrigin="Origin.BottomLeft" TransformOrigin="Origin.TopLeft">
                    @foreach (var b in _backups)

                        var backup = b;
                        <MudMenuItem OnClick="@(() => RestoreBackupAsync(backup))">
                            @DtSvc.Format(backup.TakenAtUtc, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")@DtSvc.ZoneSuffix
                        </MudMenuItem>

                </MudMenu>
            </MudTooltip>

            <MudDivider Vertical="true" FlexItem="true" Class="mx-1" />

                                  Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.WrapText" Color="@Color.Default"
                                  ToggledIcon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.WrapText" ToggledColor="@Color.Primary"
                                  Size="Size.Small" />
        </MudTooltip>

        <MudDivider Vertical="true" FlexItem="true" Class="mx-1" />

        <ToolbarRefresh Loading="@_loading" OnRefresh="RefreshAsync" TooltipText="Reload (Ctrl+Alt+R)" />

        @if (_dirty)
        {
            <span class="bm-muted bm-config-dirty-flag" title="Unsaved changes">● unsaved changes</span>
        }

    {
        <MudAlert Severity="Severity.Error" Dense="true" Class="ma-2">@_error</MudAlert>

        <MudProgressLinear Indeterminate="true" Color="Color.Primary" />

    <div class="bm-config-editor" style="@(_error is not null ? "display:none" : "")" @ref="_editorRef"></div>

    <div class="bm-batch-toolbar bm-config-footer">
        <span class="bm-config-path bm-monospace bm-muted" title="@_sourcePath">@(_sourcePath ?? "")</span>

@code {
    [Parameter, EditorRequired] public string Environment { get; set; } = string.Empty;

    private string? _sourcePath;
    private string  _content = "";
    private string? _error;
    private bool    _loading = true;
    private bool    _saving;
    private bool    _editable;
    private bool    _dirty;
    private bool    _wordWrap;
    private List<EnvConfigBackup> _backups = [];

    private ElementReference _editorRef;
    private IJSObjectReference? _module;
    private IJSObjectReference? _appModule;
    private bool _editorReady;
    private DotNetObjectReference<ConfigPage>? _selfRef;
    private const string WordWrapStorageKey = "bm-config-wordwrap";

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        _editable = EnvConfigSvc.IsEditingEnabled(Environment);
        ThemeSvc.OnChange += OnAppThemeChanged;
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    protected override async Task OnAfterRenderAsync(bool firstRender)
    {
        if (firstRender)
        {
            _selfRef = DotNetObjectReference.Create(this);
            try
            {
                _module    = await JS.InvokeAsync<IJSObjectReference>("import", "./js/text-editor.js?v=6");
                _appModule = await JS.InvokeAsync<IJSObjectReference>("import", "./js/app.js?v=7");
                var stored = await _appModule.InvokeAsync<string?>("getLocalStorage", WordWrapStorageKey);
                _wordWrap  = stored == "1";
                StateHasChanged();
            }
            catch (Exception ex) { ReportInitFailed(ex); }
        }

        // Editor mounts once content is loaded and the container div has actually
        // rendered (it's hidden via display:none while _error is set, so wait for that
        // to clear too — CodeMirror measures the container on init).
        if (_module is not null && !_editorReady && !_loading && _error is null)
        {
            _editorReady = true;
            try { await _module.InvokeVoidAsync("init", _editorRef, _content, _sourcePath ?? "", _editable, _selfRef, ThemeSvc.IsDark, _wordWrap); }
            catch (Exception ex) { ReportInitFailed(ex); }
        }
    }

    /// <summary>Invoked from text-editor.js whenever the editor's dirty state changes.</summary>
    [JSInvokable]
    public void OnDirtyChanged(bool dirty)
    {
        if (_dirty == dirty) return;
        _dirty = dirty;
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    /// <summary>Invoked from text-editor.js's Ctrl+S binding.</summary>
    [JSInvokable]
    public Task OnSaveShortcut() => _editable ? SaveAsync() : Task.CompletedTask;

    /// <summary>Invoked from text-editor.js's Ctrl+Alt+R binding.</summary>
    [JSInvokable]
    public Task OnReloadShortcut() => RefreshAsync();

    private async Task OnWordWrapToggled(bool enabled)
    {
        if (_module is null) return;
        try { await _module.InvokeVoidAsync("setWordWrap", _editorRef, enabled); }
        catch (Exception ex) { Notifications.Report($"Failed to toggle word wrap: {ex.Message}", ex, "Config"); }
    }

    /// <summary>Invoked from text-editor.js whenever word wrap changes (toolbar button or
    /// the Ctrl+Alt+W shortcut) — keeps the toggle button in sync and persists the choice.</summary>
    [JSInvokable]
    public async Task OnWordWrapChanged(bool enabled)
    {
        _wordWrap = enabled;
        StateHasChanged();
        if (_appModule is not null)
        {
            try { await _appModule.InvokeVoidAsync("setLocalStorage", WordWrapStorageKey, enabled ? "1" : "0"); }
            catch (Exception ex) { Notifications.Report($"Failed to persist word wrap preference: {ex.Message}", ex, "Config"); }
        }
    }

    private void OnAppThemeChanged()
    {
        if (_module is null) return;
        _ = InvokeAsync(async () =>
        {
            try { await _module.InvokeVoidAsync("setTheme", _editorRef, ThemeSvc.IsDark); }
            catch (Exception ex) { Notifications.Report($"Failed to update editor theme: {ex.Message}", ex, "Config"); }
        });
    }

    private void ReportInitFailed(Exception ex) =>
        Notifications.Report($"Failed to initialize the config editor: {ex.Message}", ex, "Config");

    private async Task Cmd(string name)
    {
        if (_module is null) return;
        try { await _module.InvokeVoidAsync(name, _editorRef); }
        catch (Exception ex) { Notifications.Report($"Editor command failed: {ex.Message}", ex, "Config"); }
    }

    /// <summary>Refresh button — confirms first if there are unsaved edits, since a reload discards them.</summary>
    private async Task RefreshAsync()
    {
        if (_dirty && !await ConfirmDiscardAsync("Reload from disk and discard your unsaved changes?")) return;
        await LoadAsync();
    }

    private async Task<bool> ConfirmDiscardAsync(string message)
    {
        var dialog = await DialogService.ShowAsync<ConfirmDialog>("Discard changes?", new DialogParameters<ConfirmDialog>
        {
            { x => x.Message,     message   },
            { x => x.ConfirmText, "Discard" },
        }, new DialogOptions { MaxWidth = MaxWidth.ExtraSmall });
        var result = await dialog.Result;
        return result is { Canceled: false };
    }

    private async Task LoadAsync()
    {
        _loading = true;
        _error   = null;
        StateHasChanged();

        try
        {
            _sourcePath = EnvConfigSvc.GetSourcePath(Environment);
            if (_sourcePath is null)
            {
                _error = $"Could not resolve the config file path for environment '{Environment}' — check EnvConfig:SourcePathTemplate and the environment's Servers list.";
                return;
            }

            var (text, _) = await LogViewerSvc.ReadAllAsync(_sourcePath);
            _content = text;
            _backups = EnvConfigSvc.ListBackups(Environment).ToList();

            // A refresh after the editor already mounted should replace its content
            // (discarding any unsaved edits) rather than being ignored.
            if (_editorReady && _module is not null)
                await _module.InvokeVoidAsync("setValue", _editorRef, _content);
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            _error = ex.Message;
            Notifications.Report($"Failed to load config file: {ex.Message}", ex, "Config");
        }
        finally
        {
            _loading = false;
            StateHasChanged();
        }
    }

    private async Task RestoreBackupAsync(EnvConfigBackup backup)
    {
        if (_module is null) return;
        if (_dirty && !await ConfirmDiscardAsync("Load this backup into the editor and discard your unsaved changes? (You'll still need to click Save to actually restore it.)")) return;

        try
        {
            var (text, _) = await LogViewerSvc.ReadAllAsync(backup.Path);
            await _module.InvokeVoidAsync("setValue", _editorRef, text);
            Snackbar.Add("Backup loaded into the editor — click Save to restore it.", Severity.Info);
        }
        catch (Exception ex)
        {
            Notifications.Report($"Failed to load backup {backup.Path}: {ex.Message}", ex, "Config");
        }
    }

    private async Task SaveAsync()
    {
        if (_module is null || _sourcePath is null) return;

        var content = await _module.InvokeAsync<string>("getValue", _editorRef);
        var targets = EnvConfigSvc.GetSaveTargets(Environment);

        if (targets.Count > 1)
        {
            var message = $"This will overwrite the following {targets.Count} file(s) (a timestamped backup of the source copy is taken first):\n\n" +
                           string.Join("\n", targets.Select(t => $"• {t}"));
            var dialog = await DialogService.ShowAsync<ConfirmDialog>("Save config to all servers?", new DialogParameters<ConfirmDialog>
            {
                { x => x.Message,     message },
                { x => x.ConfirmText, "Save"  },
            }, new DialogOptions { MaxWidth = MaxWidth.Small, FullWidth = true });
            var result = await dialog.Result;
            if (result is null or { Canceled: true }) return;
        }

        _saving = true;
        StateHasChanged();
        try
        {
            var results = await EnvConfigSvc.SaveAsync(Environment, content);
            var failed  = results.Where(r => !r.Success).ToList();

            foreach (var f in failed)
                Notifications.Report($"Failed to save config to {f.Path}: {f.Error}", source: "Config");

            if (failed.Count == 0)
            {
                Snackbar.Add($"Saved to {results.Count} location(s).", Severity.Success);
                if (_module is not null) await _module.InvokeVoidAsync("markClean", _editorRef);
                _backups = EnvConfigSvc.ListBackups(Environment).ToList();
            }
            else if (failed.Count < results.Count)
                Snackbar.Add($"Saved to {results.Count - failed.Count}/{results.Count} location(s) — see Settings for failures.", Severity.Warning);
            else
                Snackbar.Add("Save failed on all locations — see Settings for details.", Severity.Error);
        }
        finally
        {
            _saving = false;
            StateHasChanged();
        }
    }

    public async ValueTask DisposeAsync()
    {
        ThemeSvc.OnChange -= OnAppThemeChanged;
        if (_module is not null)
        {
            try { await _module.InvokeVoidAsync("dispose", _editorRef); } catch { }
            try { await _module.DisposeAsync(); } catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
        }
        if (_appModule is not null)
        {
            try { await _appModule.DisposeAsync(); } catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
        }
        _selfRef?.Dispose();
    }
}
FILE src/NxtUI.Web/Pages/EnvironmentPage.razor

@namespace NxtUI.Web.Pages

<div class="bm-page bm-env-page">

    <div class="bm-env-grid">

        <!-- ── LEFT COLUMN ──────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
        <div class="bm-env-left">

            <!-- Booking -->
            <MudPaper Elevation="0" Class="bm-env-section">
                <div class="bm-env-section-header">
                    <MudIcon Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.EventAvailable" Size="Size.Small" Class="bm-env-section-icon" />
                    <span class="bm-env-section-title">Environment Booking</span>
                    <span class="bm-muted" style="font-size:11px;">@DateTime.Today.ToString("dddd, MMMM d")</span>
                </div>

                <div class="bm-env-booking-legend">
                    <span class="bm-env-slot bm-env-slot-free bm-env-slot-demo">Free</span>
                    <span class="bm-env-slot bm-env-slot-mine bm-env-slot-demo">Yours</span>
                    <span class="bm-env-slot bm-env-slot-taken bm-env-slot-demo">Taken</span>

                <div class="bm-env-timeline">
                    @foreach (var slot in _slots)
                    {
                        <div class="bm-env-slot @SlotClass(slot)"
                             title="@SlotTooltip(slot)"
                             @onclick="@(() => ToggleSlot(slot))">
                            @if (slot.Hour % 2 == 0 && slot.Minute == 0)
                            {
                                <span class="bm-env-slot-label">@slot.ToString("HH:mm")</span>
                            }
                        </div>

                </div>

                <div class="bm-env-booking-actions">
                    @if (_selectedSlots.Count > 0)
                    {
                        var first = _selectedSlots.Min();
                        var last  = _selectedSlots.Max().AddMinutes(15);
                        <span class="bm-muted" style="font-size:12px;">
                            Selected: <strong>@first.ToString("HH:mm") – @last.ToString("HH:mm")</strong>
                        </span>
                        <MudButton Size="Size.Small" Variant="Variant.Filled" Color="Color.Primary"
                                   OnClick="BookSelected">Book</MudButton>
                        <MudButton Size="Size.Small" Variant="Variant.Text"
                                   OnClick="@(() => _selectedSlots.Clear())">Clear</MudButton>
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <span class="bm-muted" style="font-size:12px;">Click slots to select a time range</span>
                    }
                </div>
            </MudPaper>

            <!-- Quick Links -->
            <MudPaper Elevation="0" Class="bm-env-section">
                <div class="bm-env-section-header">
                    <MudIcon Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.OpenInNew" Size="Size.Small" Class="bm-env-section-icon" />
                    <span class="bm-env-section-title">Quick Links</span>
                </div>
                <div class="bm-env-links-grid">
                    @foreach (var link in _links)
                    {
                        <div class="bm-env-link-card" title="@link.Url">
                            <MudIcon Icon="@link.Icon" Size="Size.Medium" Style="@($"color:{link.Color}")" />
                            <span class="bm-env-link-label">@link.Label</span>
                            <span class="bm-muted bm-env-link-desc">@link.Description</span>
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            </MudPaper>

        </div>

        <!-- ── RIGHT COLUMN ─────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
        <div class="bm-env-right">

            <!-- Components -->
            <MudPaper Elevation="0" Class="bm-env-section bm-env-components-section">
                <div class="bm-env-section-header">
                    <MudIcon Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Extension" Size="Size.Small" Class="bm-env-section-icon" />
                    <span class="bm-env-section-title">Components</span>
                    <MudButton Size="Size.Small" Variant="Variant.Outlined"
                               Disabled="@(!_components.Any(c => c.Pending))"
                               OnClick="ApplyComponents"
                               Class="bm-env-apply-btn">Apply</MudButton>
                </div>
                <div class="bm-env-components-list">
                    @foreach (var comp in _components)
                    {
                        <div class="bm-env-component-row">
                            <MudCheckBox T="bool" Value="@comp.Selected"
                                         ValueChanged="@(v => comp.Selected = v)"
                                         Size="Size.Small"
                                         Color="Color.Primary"
                                         Disabled="@(comp.Status == CompStatus.Installing)" />
                            <div class="bm-env-component-info">
                                <span class="bm-env-component-name">@comp.Name</span>
                                <span class="bm-muted bm-env-component-ver">@comp.Version</span>
                            </div>
                            <div class="bm-env-component-status">
                                @switch (comp.Status)
                                {
                                    case CompStatus.Installed:
                                        <MudChip T="string" Size="Size.Small" Color="Color.Success" Variant="Variant.Text">Installed</MudChip>
                                        break;
                                    case CompStatus.NotInstalled:
                                        <MudChip T="string" Size="Size.Small" Color="Color.Default" Variant="Variant.Text">Not installed</MudChip>
                                        break;
                                    case CompStatus.Installing:
                                        <MudChip T="string" Size="Size.Small" Color="Color.Warning" Variant="Variant.Text">
                                            <MudProgressCircular Size="Size.Small" Indeterminate="true" Class="mr-1" />
                                            Installing…
                                        </MudChip>
                                        break;
                                    case CompStatus.Error:
                                        <MudChip T="string" Size="Size.Small" Color="Color.Error" Variant="Variant.Text">Error</MudChip>
                                        break;
                                }
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    }
                </div>
            </MudPaper>

            <!-- Terminal -->
            <MudPaper Elevation="0" Class="bm-env-section bm-env-terminal-section">
                <div class="bm-env-section-header">
                    <MudIcon Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.Terminal" Size="Size.Small" Class="bm-env-section-icon" />
                    <span class="bm-env-section-title">Installation Log</span>
                    <MudIconButton Icon="@Icons.Material.Outlined.DeleteSweep"
                                   Size="Size.Small"
                                   title="Clear"
                                   OnClick="@(() => _termLines.Clear())" />
                </div>
                <div class="bm-env-terminal">
                    @foreach (var line in _termLines)
                    {
                        <div class="bm-env-term-line @line.Css">@line.Text</div>
                    }
                    @if (!_termLines.Any())
                    {
                        <div class="bm-env-term-line bm-term-muted">Waiting for operations…</div>
                    }
                </div>
            </MudPaper>

        </div>
    </div>
</div>

@code {
    [Parameter] public string Env { get; set; } = string.Empty;

    // ── enums / models ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private enum CompStatus { Installed, NotInstalled, Installing, Error }

    private sealed class Component
    {
        public string     Name     { get; init; } = "";
        public string     Version  { get; init; } = "";
        public CompStatus Status   { get; set;  }
        public bool       Selected { get; set;  }
        public bool       Pending  => Selected != (Status == CompStatus.Installed);
    }

    private sealed class TermLine
    {
        public string Text { get; init; } = "";
        public string Css  { get; init; } = "";
    }

    private sealed class QuickLink
    {
        public string Label       { get; init; } = "";
        public string Description { get; init; } = "";
        public string Url         { get; init; } = "#";
        public string Icon        { get; init; } = Icons.Material.Outlined.Link;
        public string Color       { get; init; } = "#888";
    }

    // ── state ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private readonly List<DateTime> _slots        = [];
    private readonly HashSet<DateTime> _selectedSlots = [];
    private readonly HashSet<DateTime> _myBookings    = [];
    private readonly Dictionary<DateTime, string> _otherBookings = [];

    private readonly List<Component> _components = [];
    private readonly List<TermLine>  _termLines  = [];
    private readonly List<QuickLink> _links      = [];

    // ── init ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    protected override void OnInitialized()
    {
        // Time slots: 07:00 – 20:00 in 15-min increments
        var day = DateTime.Today.AddHours(7);
        while (day.Hour < 20)
        {
            _slots.Add(day);
            day = day.AddMinutes(15);
        }

        // Mock other bookings
        var taken = new[] { (9, 0), (9, 15), (9, 30), (11, 0), (11, 15), (14, 30), (14, 45), (15, 0) };
        foreach (var (h, m) in taken)
            _otherBookings[DateTime.Today.AddHours(h).AddMinutes(m)] = h < 12 ? "Alice" : "Bob";

        // Mock my existing booking
        _myBookings.Add(DateTime.Today.AddHours(13));
        _myBookings.Add(DateTime.Today.AddHours(13).AddMinutes(15));
        _myBookings.Add(DateTime.Today.AddHours(13).AddMinutes(30));

        // Quick links
        _links.AddRange([
            new QuickLink { Label = "Grafana",  Description = "Metrics & dashboards", Icon = Icons.Material.Outlined.BarChart,     Color = "#f46800", Url = "http://grafana:3000" },
            new QuickLink { Label = "Kibana",   Description = "Log explorer",          Icon = Icons.Material.Outlined.ManageSearch, Color = "#00bfb3", Url = "http://kibana:5601"  },
            new QuickLink { Label = "Jenkins",  Description = "CI / CD pipelines",     Icon = Icons.Material.Outlined.Build,        Color = "#d33833", Url = "http://jenkins:8080" },
            new QuickLink { Label = "Swagger",  Description = "API reference",         Icon = Icons.Material.Outlined.Api,          Color = "#85ea2d", Url = "http://api/swagger"  },
            new QuickLink { Label = "RabbitMQ", Description = "Message broker UI",     Icon = Icons.Material.Outlined.Router,       Color = "#ff6600", Url = "http://rabbitmq:15672" },
            new QuickLink { Label = "Seq",      Description = "Structured logs",       Icon = Icons.Material.Outlined.FormatListBulleted, Color = "#a78bfa", Url = "http://seq:5341" },
        ]);

        // Components
        _components.AddRange([
            new Component { Name = "API Gateway",         Version = "2.4.1",  Status = CompStatus.Installed,    Selected = true  },
            new Component { Name = "Auth Service",        Version = "1.9.0",  Status = CompStatus.Installed,    Selected = true  },
            new Component { Name = "Notification Worker", Version = "3.1.2",  Status = CompStatus.NotInstalled, Selected = false },
            new Component { Name = "Report Generator",    Version = "1.2.0",  Status = CompStatus.NotInstalled, Selected = false },
            new Component { Name = "Data Importer",       Version = "0.8.5",  Status = CompStatus.Installed,    Selected = true  },
            new Component { Name = "Scheduler",           Version = "2.0.0",  Status = CompStatus.Error,        Selected = false },
            new Component { Name = "Cache Warmer",        Version = "1.0.3",  Status = CompStatus.NotInstalled, Selected = false },
            new Component { Name = "Audit Logger",        Version = "1.5.1",  Status = CompStatus.Installed,    Selected = true  },
        ]);

        // Mock initial terminal output
        _termLines.AddRange([
            new TermLine { Text = "$ env-manager init --env " + Env,        Css = "bm-term-cmd"     },
            new TermLine { Text = "Connecting to environment registry…",     Css = "bm-term-muted"   },
            new TermLine { Text = "✓ Connected  (registry v2.4)",           Css = "bm-term-ok"      },
            new TermLine { Text = "✓ Auth Service        v1.9.0  [up]",     Css = "bm-term-ok"      },
            new TermLine { Text = "✓ API Gateway         v2.4.1  [up]",     Css = "bm-term-ok"      },
            new TermLine { Text = "✓ Data Importer       v0.8.5  [up]",     Css = "bm-term-ok"      },
            new TermLine { Text = "✗ Scheduler           v2.0.0  [error]",  Css = "bm-term-error"   },
            new TermLine { Text = "  → Process exited with code 1",         Css = "bm-term-error"   },
            new TermLine { Text = "Ready.",                                  Css = "bm-term-muted"   },
        ]);
    }

    // ── booking ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private string SlotClass(DateTime slot)
    {
        if (_myBookings.Contains(slot))   return "bm-env-slot-mine";
        if (_otherBookings.ContainsKey(slot)) return "bm-env-slot-taken";
        if (_selectedSlots.Contains(slot))    return "bm-env-slot-selected";
        return "bm-env-slot-free";
    }

    private string SlotTooltip(DateTime slot)
    {
        if (_myBookings.Contains(slot))          return $"Your booking · {slot:HH:mm}";
        if (_otherBookings.TryGetValue(slot, out var who)) return $"Booked by {who} · {slot:HH:mm}";
        return slot.ToString("HH:mm");
    }

    private void ToggleSlot(DateTime slot)
    {
        if (_myBookings.Contains(slot) || _otherBookings.ContainsKey(slot)) return;
        if (!_selectedSlots.Remove(slot))
            _selectedSlots.Add(slot);
    }

    private void BookSelected()
    {
        var sorted = _selectedSlots.Order().ToList();
        foreach (var s in sorted) _myBookings.Add(s);
        _selectedSlots.Clear();

        var first = sorted.First();
        var last  = sorted.Last().AddMinutes(15);
        _termLines.Add(new TermLine { Text = $"$ book --from {first:HH:mm} --to {last:HH:mm}", Css = "bm-term-cmd" });
        _termLines.Add(new TermLine { Text = $"✓ Environment booked {first:HH:mm}–{last:HH:mm}", Css = "bm-term-ok" });
    }

    // ── components ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task ApplyComponents()
    {
        var toInstall   = _components.Where(c => c.Selected  && c.Status != CompStatus.Installed).ToList();
        var toUninstall = _components.Where(c => !c.Selected && c.Status == CompStatus.Installed).ToList();

        foreach (var c in toInstall.Concat(toUninstall))
            c.Status = CompStatus.Installing;
        StateHasChanged();

        foreach (var c in toInstall)
        {
            _termLines.Add(new TermLine { Text = $"$ install {c.Name} {c.Version}", Css = "bm-term-cmd" });
            _termLines.Add(new TermLine { Text = $"  Pulling image…",               Css = "bm-term-muted" });
            StateHasChanged();
            await Task.Delay(800);
            _termLines.Add(new TermLine { Text = $"✓ {c.Name} installed successfully", Css = "bm-term-ok" });
            c.Status = CompStatus.Installed;
            StateHasChanged();
        }

        foreach (var c in toUninstall)
        {
            _termLines.Add(new TermLine { Text = $"$ uninstall {c.Name}", Css = "bm-term-cmd" });
            StateHasChanged();
            await Task.Delay(500);
            _termLines.Add(new TermLine { Text = $"✓ {c.Name} removed", Css = "bm-term-ok" });
            c.Status = CompStatus.NotInstalled;
            StateHasChanged();
        }
    }
}

@code {
    [Parameter] public string  Env            { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    [Parameter] public string? NavigationHint { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public bool    IsFocused      { get; set; }
    [Parameter] public TabModel? Tab          { get; set; }

    // ── filter grammar for log lines ──────────────────────────────────────
    private static readonly FilterParser LogLineParser = new(
        searchableFields: ["Level", "Machine", "Message"],
        aliases: new Dictionary<string, string>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
        {
            ["ts"]        = "Timestamp",
            ["timestamp"] = "Timestamp",
            ["level"]     = "Level",
            ["machine"]   = "Machine",
            ["pid"]       = "Pid",
            ["thread"]    = "ThreadId",
            ["tid"]       = "ThreadId",
            ["msg"]       = "Message",
            ["message"]   = "Message",
            ["caller"]    = "Caller",
        });

    private static readonly (string Aliases, string Label)[] ContentFieldHints =
    [
        ("ts / timestamp", "entry timestamp"),
        ("level",          "INFO · WARN · ERROR · DEBUG"),
        ("machine",        "server / machine name"),
        ("pid",            "process id (integer)"),
        ("thread / tid",   "thread id (integer)"),
        ("msg / message",  "log message text"),
        ("caller",         "calling method"),
    ];

    // ── filter grammar for the always-visible row filter (filters the file table
    // itself — Server/FileName/Size/dates — distinct from the content filter above,
    // which filters log LINES inside files during a recursive search). ──────────
    private static readonly FilterParser FileRowParser = new(
        searchableFields: ["Server", "FileName"],
        aliases: new Dictionary<string, string>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
        {
            ["server"]   = "Server",
            ["host"]     = "Server",
            ["file"]     = "FileName",
            ["filename"] = "FileName",
            ["name"]     = "FileName",
            ["size"]     = "SizeBytes",
            ["created"]  = "CreatedUtc",
            ["updated"]  = "LastModifiedUtc",
            ["modified"] = "LastModifiedUtc",
            ["path"]     = "FullPath",
            ["fullpath"] = "FullPath",
        });

    private static readonly (string Aliases, string Label)[] RowFieldHints =
    [
        ("server / host",         "server / machine name"),
        ("file / filename / name", "file name"),
        ("size",                  "file size (bytes)"),
        ("created",               "creation time"),
        ("updated / modified",    "last modified time"),
        ("path / fullpath",       "full file path"),
    ];

    // ── panel resize ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    private ElementReference _bodyRef;
    private ElementReference _treePanelRef;
    private double            _treePanelWidth = 280;
    private DotNetObjectReference<FileBrowser>? _selfRef;

    [JSInvokable]
    public void SetTreeWidth(double width) =>
        _treePanelWidth = Math.Clamp(width, 160, 600);

    private async Task OnResizerMouseDown(MouseEventArgs e)
    {
        _selfRef ??= DotNetObjectReference.Create(this);
        await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("logBrowserResizer.start", e.ClientX, _selfRef, _bodyRef, _treePanelRef);
    }

    // ── tree state ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    private List<string>        _servers   = new();
    private List<LogFolderNode> _rootNodes = new();

    private readonly Dictionary<string, IReadOnlyList<LogFolderNode>> _childCache =
        new(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
    private readonly HashSet<string> _expanded = new(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

    private readonly LogFolderNode _loadingNode = new("…", "__loading__", false);

    // Sidebar tree filter — same shared filter grammar as every other filter box
    // (AND/OR/NOT/parens, see docs/08_FilterSyntax.md), evaluated against the folder's
    // full RelativePath by default (not just its own Name), so typing an ancestor
    // segment (e.g. "orders") surfaces every folder underneath it, not just folders
    // literally named "orders". A folder is kept if it matches OR any of its (loaded)
    // descendants match — see NodeMatchesOrHasDescendantMatch. Purely client-side:
    // operates only on whatever's already in _rootNodes/_childCache (i.e. branches the
    // user has manually expanded at some point) — typing a filter never itself triggers
    // a server call to go fetch unexplored branches just to search inside them.
    private static readonly FilterParser TreeFilterParser = new(
        searchableFields: ["RelativePath"],
        aliases: new Dictionary<string, string>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
        {
            ["path"] = "RelativePath",
            ["name"] = "Name",
        });

    private static readonly (string Aliases, string Label)[] TreeFieldHints =
    [
        ("path", "full folder path (default)"),
        ("name", "folder name only"),
    ];

    private string      _treeFilterText  = "";
    private string?     _treeFilterError;
    private FilterNode? _treeFilterNode;

    private void OnTreeFilterChanged(string v)
    {
        _treeFilterText  = v;
        _treeFilterError = null;
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(v)) { _treeFilterNode = null; return; }
        try   { _treeFilterNode = TreeFilterParser.Parse(v, DtSvc.UseUtc); }
        catch (Exception ex) { _treeFilterError = ex.Message; _treeFilterNode = null; }
    }

    private List<LogFolderNode> FilteredRootNodes =>
        _treeFilterNode is null
            ? _rootNodes
            : _rootNodes.Where(NodeMatchesOrHasDescendantMatch).ToList();

    private Dictionary<string, IReadOnlyList<LogFolderNode>> FilteredChildCache =>
        _treeFilterNode is null
            ? _childCache
            : _childCache.ToDictionary(
                kv => kv.Key,
                kv => (IReadOnlyList<LogFolderNode>)kv.Value.Where(NodeMatchesOrHasDescendantMatch).ToList(),
                StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

    // A folder survives the filter if it matches itself, or any (already-loaded)
    // descendant matches — otherwise a non-matching parent would hide matching
    // children beneath it entirely.
    private bool NodeMatchesOrHasDescendantMatch(LogFolderNode n) =>
        FilterEvaluator.Evaluate(_treeFilterNode, n) ||
        (_childCache.TryGetValue(n.RelativePath, out var children) && children.Any(NodeMatchesOrHasDescendantMatch));

    // While filtering, auto-expand every node that has a surviving (kept) child, so the
    // match is actually visible without the user manually expanding each ancestor.
    private HashSet<string> EffectiveExpanded =>
        _treeFilterNode is null
            ? _expanded
            : new HashSet<string>(
                _expanded.Concat(FilteredChildCache.Where(kv => kv.Value.Count > 0).Select(kv => kv.Key)),
                StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);

    // ── file / search state ───────────────────────────────────────────────
    // Checked folders (checkbox column) — independent of _expanded (which folders are
    // open in the tree) and independent of each other; the files table aggregates
    // results from every checked path across all servers.
    private readonly HashSet<string> _checkedPaths = new(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
    private List<LogFileEntry> _files        = new();
    private bool               _loadingFiles;
    private bool               _initialized;
    private DateTime?          _lastScan;
    private string?            _lastHint;
    private string?            _initError;
    // tracks which tree nodes are currently fetching their children
    private readonly HashSet<string> _loadingNodes = new(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
    // Bumped every time the checked-path set changes — lets an in-flight LoadFilesAsync
    // detect it's been superseded by a newer selection change and discard its result.
    private int _loadGeneration;

    // always-visible row filter — filters the currently-loaded file table itself
    private string      _rowFilterText  = "";
    private string?     _rowFilterError;
    private FilterNode? _rowFilterNode;

    private List<LogFileEntry> FilteredFiles =>
        _rowFilterNode is null ? _files : _files.Where(f => FilterEvaluator.Evaluate(_rowFilterNode, f)).ToList();

    private void OnRowFilterChanged(string v)
    {
        _rowFilterText  = v;
        _rowFilterError = null;
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(v)) { _rowFilterNode = null; return; }
        try   { _rowFilterNode = FileRowParser.Parse(v, DtSvc.UseUtc); }
        catch (Exception ex) { _rowFilterError = ex.Message; _rowFilterNode = null; }
    }

    // collapsible search bar (second toolbar row)
    private bool _searchBarOpen;

    private async Task ToggleSearchBarAsync()
    {
        _searchBarOpen = !_searchBarOpen;
        RestartPollingIfBrowsing();
        await Task.CompletedTask;
    }

    // search — placeholder until OnInitializedAsync sets it from LogSettings.DefaultFileGlob
    // (injected properties aren't available yet at field-initializer time).
    private string    _fileGlob           = "*";
    private string    _contentFilterStr   = "";
    private FilterNode? _contentFilterNode;
    private string?   _contentFilterError;
    private bool      _isSearching;
    private bool      _isSearchMode;      // true = table shows recursive search results

    private CancellationTokenSource  _cts        = new();
    private CancellationTokenSource? _searchCts;
    private FocusGatedPoller?        _poller;
    private bool                     _previousIsFocused;
    private bool                     _searchCapped;

    // Scroll-position preservation for the file table across auto-poll refreshes.
    private ElementReference _filesPanelRef;
    private bool             _restoreScroll;

    // ── lifecycle ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    protected override async Task OnInitializedAsync()
    {
        var interval = TimeSpan.FromSeconds(Math.Max(5, LogSettings.Value.FolderScanIntervalSeconds));
        _poller = new FocusGatedPoller(interval, async ct =>
        {
            // Skip auto-refresh while a search is running. Preserve scroll so the
            // periodic file-list refresh doesn't yank the user back to the top.
            if (_checkedPaths.Count > 0 && !_isSearching && !_isSearchMode)
                await InvokeAsync(() => LoadFilesAsync(preserveScroll: true));
        }, ex => Logger.LogWarning(ex, "Log browser auto-refresh failed"));

        using var loadingScope = TabLoadingScope.Begin(Tab, TabService);
        _servers  = EnvironmentService.GetServers(Env).ToList();
        _fileGlob = DefaultFileGlob;

        try
        {
            var roots  = await BrowserSvc.GetSubfoldersAsync(_servers, "", _cts.Token);
            _rootNodes = roots.ToList();
        }
        catch (Exception ex) { _initError = ex.Message; }

        _initialized = true;
        _lastScan    = DateTime.UtcNow;
        _previousIsFocused = IsFocused;
        // No auto-start here — polling only begins once the user actually selects a
        // folder or toggles the search bar (see RestartPollingIfBrowsing).

        // Root is always expanded by default so the top-level folder list is visible
        // immediately, same as before "Root" existed as an explicit node.
        _expanded.Add("");
        await NavigateToStartupFolderAsync();
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Expands the tree down to the configured StartupFolder (relative to Root,
    /// {today} substituted — see ILogBrowserService.ResolveStartupPath), one segment
    /// at a time, stopping silently at the first segment that doesn't exist. Does not
    /// check/select the folder — matches the old hardcoded "auto-expand today's date
    /// folder" behaviour this replaces (expand only, not select).
    /// </summary>
    private async Task NavigateToStartupFolderAsync()
    {
        var startup = BrowserSvc.ResolveStartupPath();
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(startup)) return;

        var segments = startup.Split('\\', StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries);
        var current = "";

        foreach (var seg in segments)
        {
            IReadOnlyList<LogFolderNode>? siblings = current == ""
                ? _rootNodes
                : _childCache.TryGetValue(current, out var cached) ? cached : null;

            if (siblings is null)
            {
                siblings = await BrowserSvc.GetSubfoldersAsync(_servers, current, _cts.Token);
                _childCache[current] = siblings;
            }

            var match = siblings.FirstOrDefault(n => n.Name.Equals(seg, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));
            if (match is null) break; // segment doesn't exist — stop drilling, keep what resolved so far

            current = string.IsNullOrEmpty(current) ? seg : current + "\\" + seg;
            _expanded.Add(current);

            // Fetch this node's own children too, not just as a lookahead for the next
            // segment — without this, the deepest (last) segment gets marked expanded
            // but its children never get cached, so the tree shows it as expanded with
            // nothing underneath until the user manually collapses and re-expands it
            // (which is what triggers OnExpandedChangedAsync's own fetch below).
            if (!_childCache.ContainsKey(current))
                _childCache[current] = await BrowserSvc.GetSubfoldersAsync(_servers, current, _cts.Token);
        }
    }

    // Synchronous and separate from OnParametersSetAsync below — this must not
    // block (fire-and-forget only) so activating a tab never stalls on it.
    protected override void OnParametersSet()
    {
        if (IsFocused == _previousIsFocused) return;
        _previousIsFocused = IsFocused;

        if (IsFocused)
        {
            // Resume auto-refresh only if the user had already selected a folder before
            // navigating away and isn't composing a search — don't restart polling just
            // because the tab regained focus.
            RestartPollingIfBrowsing();
            if (_initialized && _checkedPaths.Count > 0 && !_isSearching && !_isSearchMode)
                _ = InvokeAsync(async () =>
                {
                    try { await LoadFilesAsync(); }
                    catch (Exception ex) { Logger.LogWarning(ex, "Log browser focus refresh failed"); }
                });
        }
        else
        {
            _poller?.Stop();
        }
    }

    // Auto-refresh only runs while the user is actively browsing a selected folder and
    // the search bar isn't open (composing/viewing a search is a snapshot, not live).
    private void RestartPollingIfBrowsing()
    {
        _poller?.SetActive(IsFocused && _checkedPaths.Count > 0 && !_searchBarOpen);
    }

    protected override async Task OnAfterRenderAsync(bool firstRender)
    {
        if (_restoreScroll)
        {
            _restoreScroll = false;
            try { await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("bmScrollKeep.restore", _filesPanelRef); }
            catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
        }
    }

    protected override async Task OnParametersSetAsync()
    {
        if (NavigationHint is not null && NavigationHint != _lastHint)
        {
            _lastHint = NavigationHint;
            // Deliberately not gated on _initialized: OnParametersSetAsync can fire while
            // OnInitializedAsync's own GetSubfoldersAsync call is still in flight (Blazor
            // dispatches a fresh parameter update to an already-constructing component
            // instance the moment a second SetParametersAsync arrives, independent of
            // whether our own _initialized field has flipped true yet). Gating on it here
            // used to silently drop the hint whenever that race lost — and since _lastHint
            // was already updated, retrying the same link did nothing either; only closing
            // and reopening the tab (a fresh component instance) gave it another chance.
            // ApplyHintAsync is self-sufficient — it loads whatever tree data it needs
            // on demand — so it doesn't actually need to wait for init to finish first.
            await ApplyHintAsync(NavigationHint);
        }
    }

    // ── filter inputs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private string DefaultFileGlob =>
        string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(LogSettings.Value.DefaultFileGlob) ? "*" : LogSettings.Value.DefaultFileGlob;

    private void OnGlobChanged(string v) => _fileGlob = string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(v) ? DefaultFileGlob : v;

    private void OnContentFilterChanged(string v)
    {
        _contentFilterStr   = v;
        _contentFilterError = null;
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(v)) { _contentFilterNode = null; return; }
        try   { _contentFilterNode = LogLineParser.Parse(v, DtSvc.UseUtc); }
        catch (Exception ex) { _contentFilterError = ex.Message; _contentFilterNode = null; }
    }

    // ── search bar: Start Search / Stop button ─────────────────────────────

    private async Task OnSearchButtonClickAsync()
    {
        if (_isSearching) StopSearch();
        else               await StartSearchAsync();
    }

    // ── tree interaction ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

    // Checking a folder is entirely independent from expanding it — clicking a row
    // only ever toggles expand/collapse (below); the checkbox is the sole way to
    // add/remove a folder from the file table's result set.
    private Task OnCheckChangedAsync(LogFolderNode node, bool isChecked) =>
        SetCheckedAsync(node.RelativePath, isChecked);

    private async Task SetCheckedAsync(string relativePath, bool isChecked)
    {
        // Checking/unchecking always exits search mode — it's a browsing action.
        if (_isSearching) StopSearch();
        _isSearchMode = false;

        if (isChecked) _checkedPaths.Add(relativePath);
        else           _checkedPaths.Remove(relativePath);

        await LoadFilesAsync();
        RestartPollingIfBrowsing();
    }

    private async Task OnItemClickAsync(LogFolderNode node)
    {
        if (node.HasChildren)
        {
            var isExpanded = _expanded.Contains(node.RelativePath);
            await OnExpandedChangedAsync(node, !isExpanded);
        }

        // Clicking a folder to open it also checks it, so its files show up in the
        // table without a separate checkbox click. Never unchecks on click — that
        // stays the checkbox's job, so collapsing a folder doesn't drop its results.
        if (!_checkedPaths.Contains(node.RelativePath))
            await SetCheckedAsync(node.RelativePath, true);
    }

    private async Task OnExpandedChangedAsync(LogFolderNode node, bool expanded)
    {
        if (expanded)
        {
            _expanded.Add(node.RelativePath);
            if (!_childCache.ContainsKey(node.RelativePath))
            {
                _loadingNodes.Add(node.RelativePath);
                _loadingFiles = true;
                using var loadingScope = TabLoadingScope.Begin(Tab, TabService);
                StateHasChanged();
                await Task.Yield();
                try
                {
                    var children = await BrowserSvc.GetSubfoldersAsync(_servers, node.RelativePath, _cts.Token);
                    _childCache[node.RelativePath] = children;
                }
                finally
                {
                    _loadingNodes.Remove(node.RelativePath);
                    _loadingFiles = _loadingNodes.Count > 0;
                    StateHasChanged();
                }
            }
        }
        else
        {
            _expanded.Remove(node.RelativePath);
        }
    }

    // ── selection (checked folders) ───────────────────────────────────────

    private void ClearSelection()
    {
        if (_isSearching) StopSearch();
        _isSearchMode = false;
        _checkedPaths.Clear();
        _files.Clear();
        _poller?.Stop();
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    // ── hint navigation ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task ApplyHintAsync(string fullPath)
    {
        var parsed = BrowserSvc.ParseHintPath(fullPath, _servers);
        if (parsed is null) return;

        var segments = parsed.Value.RelativePath.Split('\\', StringSplitOptions.RemoveEmptyEntries);
        var current  = "";
        foreach (var seg in segments)
        {
            if (!_childCache.ContainsKey(current))
            {
                var ch = await BrowserSvc.GetSubfoldersAsync(_servers, current, _cts.Token);
                _childCache[current] = ch;
                if (current == "") _rootNodes = ch.ToList();
            }
            current = string.IsNullOrEmpty(current) ? seg : current + "\\" + seg;
            _expanded.Add(current);
        }

        _checkedPaths.Add(parsed.Value.RelativePath);
        await LoadFilesAsync();
        StateHasChanged();
    }

    // ── file loading (aggregated across all checked folders) ──────────────

    private async Task LoadFilesAsync(bool preserveScroll = false)
    {
        var myGen = ++_loadGeneration;

        if (_checkedPaths.Count == 0)
        {
            _files        = [];
            _loadingFiles = false;
            StateHasChanged();
            return;
        }

        _loadingFiles = true;
        StateHasChanged();
        await Task.Yield();

        var paths   = _checkedPaths.ToList(); // capture — user may change selection while awaiting
        var pending = new System.Collections.Concurrent.ConcurrentBag<LogFileEntry>();
        using var loadingScope = TabLoadingScope.Begin(Tab, TabService);
        try
        {
            // Collect all (path, server) combinations in parallel without touching _files mid-flight.
            await Task.WhenAll(paths.SelectMany(path => _servers.Select(async server =>
            {
                var results = await BrowserSvc.GetFilesAsync([server], path, _cts.Token);
                foreach (var r in results) pending.Add(r);
            })));

            // Swap in the new list atomically — no intermediate empty-table flash.
            // preserveScroll (auto-poll only) captures scrollTop right before the swap and
            // restores it in OnAfterRenderAsync so a background refresh is imperceptible.
            await InvokeAsync(async () =>
            {
                if (myGen != _loadGeneration) return; // superseded by a newer selection change
                if (preserveScroll)
                {
                    try { await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("bmScrollKeep.save", _filesPanelRef); }
                    catch (JSDisconnectedException) { }
                    _restoreScroll = true;
                }
                _files    = [.. pending];
                _lastScan = DateTime.UtcNow;
                StateHasChanged();
            });
        }
        finally
        {
            if (myGen == _loadGeneration)
            {
                _loadingFiles = _loadingNodes.Count > 0;
                await InvokeAsync(StateHasChanged);
            }
        }
    }

    // ── search (recursive mode, across all checked folders) ────────────────

    private async Task StartSearchAsync()
    {
        if (_checkedPaths.Count == 0) return;
        if (_contentFilterError is not null) return;

        StopSearch();

        _searchCts    = CancellationTokenSource.CreateLinkedTokenSource(_cts.Token);
        _isSearching  = true;
        _isSearchMode = true;
        _loadingFiles = true;
        _searchCapped = false;
        _files.Clear();
        using var loadingScope = TabLoadingScope.Begin(Tab, TabService);
        StateHasChanged();

        var paths      = _checkedPaths.ToList();
        var glob       = _fileGlob;
        var filter     = _contentFilterNode;
        var ct         = _searchCts.Token;
        var maxResults = LogSettings.Value.MaxSearchResults;

        // Batches UI updates instead of one StateHasChanged per match — a recursive search
        // over a large tree can yield matches far faster than a render round trip keeps up
        // with, and doing one full render per match is what made the tab feel unresponsive
        // during a big search. All callbacks below run through InvokeAsync, which marshals
        // onto Blazor Server's single renderer sync context, so this shared state is safe
        // even though multiple checked-path searches run in parallel.
        var lastFlush = DateTime.UtcNow;
        var flushInterval = TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(200);

        try
        {
            await Task.WhenAll(paths.Select(async path =>
            {
                await foreach (var entry in BrowserSvc.SearchAsync(_servers, path, glob, filter, ct))
                {
                    var reachedCap = false;
                    await InvokeAsync(() =>
                    {
                        if (_files.Count >= maxResults) return;
                        _files.Add(entry);
                        if (_files.Count >= maxResults)
                        {
                            _searchCapped = true;
                            reachedCap = true;
                        }
                        if (reachedCap || DateTime.UtcNow - lastFlush >= flushInterval)
                        {
                            lastFlush = DateTime.UtcNow;
                            StateHasChanged();
                        }
                    });
                    if (reachedCap) { await _searchCts.CancelAsync(); break; }
                }
            }));
            _lastScan = DateTime.UtcNow;
        }
        catch (OperationCanceledException) { }
        finally
        {
            _isSearching  = false;
            _loadingFiles = false;
            await InvokeAsync(StateHasChanged);
        }
    }

    private void StopSearch()
    {
        _searchCts?.Cancel();
        _searchCts?.Dispose();
        _searchCts   = null;
        _isSearching = false;
    }

    // ── refresh / polling ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task RefreshAsync()
    {
        using var loadingScope = TabLoadingScope.Begin(Tab, TabService);
        if (_checkedPaths.Count > 0)
        {
            // Invalidate each checked folder's child cache entry and reload files.
            foreach (var path in _checkedPaths.ToList())
            {
                _childCache.Remove(path);
                var children = await BrowserSvc.GetSubfoldersAsync(_servers, path, _cts.Token);
                _childCache[path] = children;
            }
            await LoadFilesAsync();
        }
        else
        {
            // Nothing checked — refresh just the root listing.
            var roots  = await BrowserSvc.GetSubfoldersAsync(_servers, "", _cts.Token);
            _rootNodes = roots.ToList();
            _lastScan  = DateTime.UtcNow;
            StateHasChanged();
        }
    }

    // ── helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

    private async Task OpenInViewer(LogFileEntry file)
    {
        var mode = LogSettings.Value.FileAccessMode;

        if (mode != LogFileAccessMode.ServerOnly)
        {
            var key = await TryOpenClientSideAsync(file);
            if (key is not null)
            {
                var tab = TabModel.CreateLogWorkspace("local:" + key, Env);
                tab.Label      = file.FileName;
                tab.NoNavigate = true;
                TabService.OpenOrFocus(tab);
                return;
            }

            if (mode == LogFileAccessMode.ClientOnly)
            {
                Notifications.Report(
                    $"Client-side file access failed for \"{file.FileName}\" — see browser console for details",
                    source: "File Browser");
                return;
            }
        }

        // ServerOnly, or ClientWithFallback's fallback: server reads the file and ships
        // it over the circuit — either the browser doesn't support the File System
        // Access API, the user cancelled the one-time folder grant, or the granted
        // folder didn't actually contain this file (wrong folder granted).
        TabService.OpenOrFocus(TabModel.CreateLogWorkspace(file.FullPath, Env));
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Tries to read <paramref name="file"/> directly in the browser instead of having
    /// the server read it. Returns a window._localFiles key on success, null on any
    /// failure (caller falls back to the normal server-read path).
    /// </summary>
    private async Task<string?> TryOpenClientSideAsync(LogFileEntry file)
    {
        if (BrowserSvc.ParseHintPath(file.FullPath, _servers) is not (var server, var relPath))
            return null;

        var lastSep = relPath.LastIndexOfAny(['\\', '/']);
        var relDir  = lastSep >= 0 ? relPath[..lastSep] : string.Empty;
        var rootTemplate = LogSettings.Value.RootFolder;

        var key = await JS.InvokeAsync<string?>("bmLogFileAccess.tryOpenSilently", server, rootTemplate, relDir, file.FileName);
        key ??= await JS.InvokeAsync<string?>("bmLogFileAccess.openWithGrant", server, rootTemplate, relDir, file.FileName);
        return key;
    }

    private void OpenInWorkspace(LogFileEntry file) =>
        TabService.OpenOrFocus(TabModel.CreateLogWorkspace(file.FullPath, Env));

    private async Task OpenLocalFileAsync()
    {
        _selfRef ??= DotNetObjectReference.Create(this);
        await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("bmOpenLocalLogFile", _selfRef);
    }

    [JSInvokable]
    public void OnLocalFileOpened(string key, string filename)
    {
        InvokeAsync(() =>
        {
            var label = System.IO.Path.GetFileName(filename) is { Length: > 0 } n ? n : filename;
            var tab   = TabModel.CreateLogWorkspace("local:" + key, Env);
            tab.Label      = label;
            tab.NoNavigate = true;
            TabService.OpenOrFocus(tab);
        });
    }


    private async Task CopyPathAsync(string path) =>
        await JS.InvokeVoidAsync("copyText", path, "Path copied to clipboard");


    private static string FormatSize(long bytes)
    {
        if (bytes < 1024)      return FormattableString.Invariant($"{bytes} B");
        if (bytes < 1_048_576) return FormattableString.Invariant($"{bytes / 1024.0:F1} KB");
        return FormattableString.Invariant($"{bytes / 1_048_576.0:F1} MB");
    }

    public async ValueTask DisposeAsync()
    {
        StopSearch();
        _poller?.Stop();
        _selfRef?.Dispose();
        await _cts.CancelAsync();
        _cts.Dispose();
    }
}
FILE src/NxtUI.Web/Pages/FilterHelp.razor
